project_area: Improving access to healthy, locally sourced food; strengthening regional food systems; enhancing food distribution infrastructure; advancing nutrition education; addressing food insecurity in rural communities
demographic_requirements: Projects must target rural communities in Maryland, with priority given to rural 'hot spot' communities facing food insecurity
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit organizations, community-based organizations, institutions (e.g., schools, hospitals), small farms, food hubs, and mobile market operators in rural Maryland. Projects must align with improving food systems, health outcomes, and regional coordination in rural communities.
